_about: Local, GITIGNORED config for the git-freshness hooks (setup/git-freshness/). Copy this to setup/local/git-freshness.config.json and tune per machine. The hook SCRIPTS are shared/committed; THIS file is per-machine so everyone can use the capability while configuring it individually.

worktree_fetch._description: PreToolUse hook: before `git worktree add`, fetch origin + ff-only pull the target repo so new branches fork off a fresh origin/<base>.

session_fetch._description: SessionStart hook: pull every clean registry repo once per session (skipped if it ran within throttle_minutes). Set enabled=false to opt out of the session-start network pull.
